source_excerpt:
Dr. Soin moved to ratify the following proposed settlement agreements:

•
Proposed consent agreements with Scott Steven Katzman, M.D.; Son M. Bach, M.D.; Michael D.
Bobb, Jr., D.O.; Seamus J. Walsh, D.O.; and Roman Kosiborod, D.O.
•  Proposed step II consent agreement with Marshall Bahr, M.D.
9

State Medical Board of Ohio Meeting Minutes – May 8, 2024

•  Proposed permanent surrenders with Maura Andronic, M.D.; Gerard Cosgrove, R.C.P.; Sean H.
McGrath, L.M.T.; Rodney Wayne Sosa, M.D.; Paris Richardson, L.M.T.; Paul S. Mitch, M.D. and
Alphonso Vincent Monzo, L.M.T.

correct_facts.quote: Proposed consent agreements with Scott Steven Katzman, M.D.
Scott Steven Katzman, M.D.; Son M. Bach, M.D.
Proposed step II consent agreement with Marshall Bahr, M.D.
Proposed permanent surrenders with Maura Andronic, M.D.

commentary: ITEMIZED extraction: one entry per named individual, count=1 each, respondent copied exactly as written (credentials included). Six consent-order entries (five listed consent agreements plus the step-II consent agreement) and seven surrender entries. Never collapse a named list into one row with a count — the total is computed by summing rows.
